dominants.dominant_desc:
1- Early Game:

-Focus On Farming In The Gold Lane: Melissa needs items to scale.

-Use Skill 2 (Eyes on You!) To Harass enemies safely through Muddles.

-Avoid Unnecessary trades if your skill 2 is on cooldown.

2- Mid Game:

-Prioritize Objectives: push turrets when enemies rotate.

-Join team fights only if your core items are ready (Corrosion +DHS/crit).

-always keep skill 3 (Go Away!) Ready to counter camper and assassins.

3- Late Game:

-Position Carefully at the backline: you are the main damage dealer.

-Combine inspire with skill 2 for maximum DPS output.

-Target frontline tanks with DHS/Malefic Roar- you will shred them fast.

-Dont waste ultimate early: save it for when assassins pushs on you. 

Shortly: Farm early game
Play safe at mid game
Carry late game

emblems.emblem_desc:
Tier 1: (Swift) increases Attack Speed

Tier 2:( Weapon Master ) add an Extra Physical Attack from items

Tier 3: (Weakness Finder) Chance slow For better Control in Fight

equips.equip_desc:
1- Windtalker = Speed & DPS.
2- Corrosion Scythe = Slow & attack speed.
3- Haas' Claws = Life steal.
4- Berserker's Fury = Crit Damage.
5- Malefic Gun = Defense Penetration.
6- Rose Gold = Magic Shield.

hero.hero_overview: Melissa is a Marksman hero mainly played in the Gold Lane. She relies heavily on her second skill (Eyes on You!), which allows her to link enemies through her doll "Muddles" and deal consistent damage from a safe distance. Melissa excels at poking during the laning phase and can quickly pressure opponents. With her sustained DPS, she is also one of the best heroes when it comes to pushing turrets and scaling into the late game as a reliable carry.
hero.hero_strength:
Provides sustained physical damage, making her very strong in extended team fights.

Excellent lane control in the Gold Lane, often forcing enemies to retreat.

Her second skill grants safe harassment and zoning potential.

Her Ultimate (Go Away!) is a powerful defensive tool against assassins or melee divers.

Becomes a strong late-game carry once she secures her core items.
hero.hero_weakness:
Highly reliant on her second skill; missing it reduces her overall impact.

Struggles against burst damage and high-mobility heroes such as Claude and Ling.

Countered by heroes like Belerick, who can reflect her damage back.

Losing her Ultimate makes her vulnerable to direct dives from melee heroes.

Requires excellent positioning; any mistake can make her an easy target.

data.recommend: Always draft Melissa with heroes who can protect her spacing and zone enemies away. She shines the most when paired with strong frontliners or crowd control initiators who keep threats away.

spell.spell_desc: Inspire greatly increases Attack Speed for a short duration. During this time, Basic Attacks ignore part of the enemy Physical Defense and gain more Lifesteal, making it strong for duels, team fights, and turret pushing.

data.title: Melissa Gold Lane Carry
